response.overview: The film is a hard-hitting political satirical drama that exposes the deep-rooted corruption and sad state of affairs within the political system. The story follows a young, rebellious man (played by Naresh) who spearheads a massive youth-led revolution to overthrow a tyrannical, power-hungry minister, despite the fact that his own brother holds a high-ranking position in the police force.
response.title: Gandipeta Rahasyam
